Dolce & Gabbana DG 2025ss spring/summer new men's business casual suit set, featuring a detachable single suit jacket and trousers. This high-end top-tier ready-to-wear collection is a leader in the suit field, using world-renowned top-grade fabrics and craftsmanship. The fabric is made of high-density elastic material, providing exceptional texture and comfort. The visual effect of drape and gloss is top-notch, elegant and exquisite. The fabric has a luxurious texture and excellent gloss, with a wrinkle-resistant treatment for a crisp and stylish look. The exquisite traditional handcrafted needlework ensures precise stitching, and the exclusive cutting technique conforms to rigorous ergonomic design. Ideal for urban elite men, this set is perfect for gifting or personal use, exuding a high level of sophistication. Sizes available: Trousers 29-38, Suits 46-58.
